source: Learning Ansible with Rocky - Ansible Galaxy: Developing a role: init, skeleton, vars and defaults

questions.q: Generate a skeleton for a new role named rocky8.
questions.why: ansible-galaxy role init <name> scaffolds the role's directory tree.

questions.q: In a role, where do you put variables you do NOT want overridden from outside?
questions.why: vars/main.yml holds variables that should not be overridden.

questions.q: Where do you put variables you DO want to allow overriding from outside the role?
questions.why: defaults/main.yml variables can be overridden by the calling playbook.

questions.q: Where is a role's task code defined?
questions.why: The role's tasks live in tasks/main.yml.

questions.q: Which role directory holds the Jinja2 templates the role needs?
questions.why: templates/ holds templates; files/ holds static files; handlers/main.yml holds handlers.

questions.q: Which Jinja filter removes the items of one list from another (used to trim the uninstall list)?
questions.why: rocky8_remove_packages | difference(rocky8_specifics_packages) subtracts the second list from the first.

questions.q: Which module does the sample role use to install/remove packages in a distro-agnostic way?
questions.why: The generic package module handles present/absent regardless of the distro's package manager.
